description: Removes the rule execution buffer associated with a G4 session, releasing its resources.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the G4 session whose buffer should be removed.

name: g4.RemoveBuffer

removed.description: Indicates whether the buffer was successfully removed. False if the session identifier was missing or no buffer existed for the session.

sessionId.description: The session identifier that was targeted for buffer removal.

title: Remove G4 Rules Buffer
